Contact.title: Contact
Contact.heroSubtitle: Exercio connects people with trusted fitness professionals and makes finding the right trainer simple and transparent. Have a question, encountered a problem, or have an idea for improving the platform? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to common questions about Exercio

bookTrainer.question: How do I book a trainer?
bookTrainer.answer: Browse our trainer directory, find a trainer that matches your goals, and click "Book a Session" on their profile. Select your preferred date and time, then confirm your booking. The trainer will receive a notification and confirm your session.

cancelBooking.question: Can I cancel a booking?
cancelBooking.answer: Yes, you can cancel a booking free of charge up to the specified notice period (usually 24 hours before the session). Go to your dashboard, find the booking, and click "Cancel". For guest bookings, use the cancellation link from your confirmation email.

becomeTrainer.question: How do I become a trainer on Exercio?
becomeTrainer.answer: You can register directly as an instructor when creating an account. If you already have a client account, there's no need to create a new one — go to your client dashboard and click "Become an Instructor". Fill in your profile with experience, specializations, and availability. Once published, clients will be able to find and book you.

profileNotVisible.question: Why can't I see my trainer profile?
profileNotVisible.answer: Your profile needs to be published to be visible in search results. Go to your dashboard, edit your profile, and click "Publish Profile". Make sure all required fields are filled in before publishing.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods are available?
paymentMethods.answer: Trainers can accept various payment methods including cash, card payments, BLIK, and bank transfers. The available options are set by each trainer and displayed on their profile. Payment is arranged directly between you and the trainer.

contactSupport.question: How can I contact Exercio support?
contactSupport.answer: Use the contact form on this page to send us a message. Select the appropriate category so we can route your inquiry to the right team. We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.

manualBooking.question: Can I manually add a session for a client as an instructor?
manualBooking.answer: Yes, simply go to your calendar, click on the desired time slot, and add the session by entering the client's details. This allows you to book sessions for clients who may not have booked through the platform themselves.

trainWithoutAccount.question: Can I train people who don't have an account?
trainWithoutAccount.answer: Yes, you can train with anyone regardless of whether they have a Exercio account. You can manually add sessions for them through your calendar, and they will receive email confirmations and reminders.

guestReview.question: Can I leave a review as a guest?
guestReview.answer: Yes, after a completed session, you will receive an email with a link to leave a review. This allows guests to share their experience even without creating an account on Exercio.

guestCancellation.question: Can I cancel a session as a guest?
guestCancellation.answer: Yes, once the instructor confirms your session, you will receive an email with a cancellation link. You can use that link to cancel the booking without needing to log in.

CookieBanner.title: 🍪 Welcome to Exercio!
CookieBanner.description: We use cookies to provide you with the best experience on our platform. Necessary cookies are always active, and you can customize the rest.
CookieBanner.customizeDescription: Choose which cookie categories you want to enable. You can change your preferences at any time.

categories.necessaryDesc: These cookies are required for basic site functionality, such as authentication and security.
categories.functionalDesc: Remember your preferences, such as language or region, to provide personalized experiences.
categories.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the site so we can improve it.
categories.marketingDesc: Used to display personalized advertisements and measure their effectiveness.

Cookies.title: Cookie Policy
Cookies.description: Exercio Cookie Policy — learn about the cookies and tracking technologies we use on our platform.
Cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Exercio uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our platform. It explains what cookies are, why we use them, and how you can control their use.
Cookies.whatAreCookiesDesc: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to the website owners.
Cookies.howWeUseDesc: We use cookies for the following purposes:
Cookies.purposeNecessary: Necessary cookies — essential for the platform to function properly (e.g., authentication, security)
Cookies.purposeFunctional: Functional cookies — remember your preferences and settings
Cookies.purposeAnalytics: Analytics cookies — help us understand how users interact with our platform so we can improve it
Cookies.purposeMarketing: Marketing cookies — used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign effectiveness
Cookies.manageConsentDesc: When you first visit our platform, you will see a cookie banner where you can:
Cookies.manageCustomize: Customize your preferences for each category
Cookies.manageChange: You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the 'Cookie Settings' link in the footer.
Cookies.thirdPartyDesc: We may use third-party services (such as Google Analytics, Stripe for payments) that place their own cookies. These third parties have their own privacy and cookie policies. We recommend reviewing their policies for more information.
Cookies.securityDesc: All cookies used on our platform are transmitted securely over HTTPS. We do not use cookies to collect personal data beyond what is necessary for the purposes described above. For more information about how we handle your data, please see our Privacy Policy.
Cookies.contactDesc: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at: support@exercio.app

SEO.whyLocalCityDesc: From personal training, through yoga, to martial arts — in {city} you'll find specialists in every field.
SEO.whyCompareDesc: Browse profiles, compare prices and reviews to find the perfect specialist for you.
SEO.whyFlexibleDesc: Compare pricing, check available slots and choose an offer tailored to your needs.

SEO.resultsDescriptionDiscipline: We found {count} {discipline} specialists. All have public profiles and are available for contact.
SEO.resultsDescriptionCity: We found {count} specialists in {city}. All have public profiles and are available for contact.
SEO.relatedDisciplines: You may also be interested in
SEO.faqCostAnswer: Prices for {discipline} vary depending on the instructor, location and session length. On Exercio you'll find profiles with visible pricing — compare offers and choose the best one for you.
SEO.faqChoose: How to choose a good {discipline} instructor?
SEO.faqChooseAnswer: Browse instructor profiles, check their reviews, pricing and availability. Pay attention to specialization, experience and whether they offer online training.
SEO.faqOnlineAnswer: Yes, many instructors offer online training. On Exercio you can filter results to find specialists offering remote sessions.
SEO.faqFirst: What does the first {discipline} consultation look like?
SEO.faqFirstAnswer: The first consultation is usually a conversation about your goals, health condition and expectations. The instructor selects an appropriate training plan and shows basic exercises.
SEO.faqCityCost: How much does personal training cost in {city}?
SEO.faqCityCostAnswer: Personal training prices in {city} vary depending on the instructor and location. On Exercio you'll find profiles with visible pricing — on average from 80 to 200 PLN per session.
SEO.faqCityChoose: How to find a good trainer in {city}?
SEO.faqCityChooseAnswer: Browse instructor profiles in {city}, check their reviews, pricing and availability. Exercio enables direct contact and online booking.
SEO.faqCityOnline: Are there online training options in {city}?
SEO.faqCityOnlineAnswer: Yes, many instructors in {city} offer online training. On Exercio you can filter results to find specialists offering remote sessions.
